def negative_domain_model_class_imports_http_library():
    rule_id = "domain_model_class_imports_http_library"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Domain model or entity file imports an HTTP framework module such as Flask, Django, or FastAPI."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
